name: apihug-create-story
description: Creates a comprehensive ApiHug story file with all context needed for dev agent implementation.

name: apihug-dev-story
description: Execute ApiHug story implementation (backend + optional frontend) following BMAD story spec with Contract-First proto design.

name: apihug-impl-review
description: Review implementation code against ApiHug golden rules. Checks ServiceImpl, Repository, DomainService for architecture/security/pattern violations.

name: apihug-proto-review
description: Review existing proto files against ApiHug proto design rules. Checks API/Database/Enum/Error proto definitions for constraint violations.

name: apihug-docs-readme
description: Initialize or update docs/README.md as the documentation governance portal for single-module BMAD + DDD projects.

name: apihug-domain-strategic-design
description: Create or refine a DDD strategic design context-map.md with macro domains, bounded context mapping, context relationships, boundary rules, audit rounds, and implementation-oriented module implications.

name: apihug-domain-tactical-design
description: Generate, review, and refine domain tactical design documents under BMAD and DDD rules. Use when creating or refining domain tactical design docs from tactical-design.md to 01~06.
